name: Deep Conditioning Treatment
description: Restorative mask matched to your hair texture, processed under gentle warmth and rinsed at the bowl.

name: Clear Gloss Refresh
description: Acidic clear gloss to seal the cuticle, revive shine, and refresh tone between color appointments.

name: Olaplex Bond Builder
description: Bond-rebuilding treatment added during or after color services. Especially useful with lightener.

name: Scalp Detox Ritual
description: Clarifying scalp scrub, pressure-point massage, and a calming tonic. Done at the bowl before your service.

name: Paraffin Soak
description: Warm paraffin dip for hands or feet. Loosens stiff joints and leaves skin noticeably softer.

name: French / Chrome Finish
description: Add a classic French tip, micro-French, or chrome powder finish to any manicure or pedicure.

name: LED Light Therapy Boost
description: Ten-minute red and near-infrared LED session layered onto any facial to support collagen and calm redness.

name: Brightening Eye Treatment
description: Cooling eye masks, peptide serum, and a brief lymphatic massage focused on the under-eye area.

name: CBD Recovery Balm
description: Therapist works a broad-spectrum CBD balm into your tightest area during your massage. No added time.

name: Hot Stone Add-On
description: Heated basalt stones glided along the back and shoulders to loosen connective tissue before deep work.
